author: NukDokPlex
description: This cog provides access to statistics from the three main osu!-servers: osu!bancho (official), osu!gatari, osu!ripple.
short: Statistics from osu! Bancho, Gatari, Ripple.
name: osu_all_servers
end_user_data_statement: This cog is not saving any sensitive user data. Uses only publicly available information and does not assign it to users in Discord, only to channels in Discord.
